$comment: Tracks provenance of files in .claude/. 'source: harness-kit' files came from the upstream plugin baseline; 'source: local' are project-specific. Run /harness-kit:harness update to sync upstream changes.

.claude/agents/code-reviewer.md.note: Project-tuned with Katana conventions (UNSET, unwrap_*, generated-file boundaries, list data envelope, help-resource sync)

.claude/agents/verifier.md.note: Project-tuned with hardcoded uv run poe check verification command

.claude/skills/open-pr/SKILL.md.note: Project-flavored open-pr workflow; harness-kit:open-pr available via plugin for the generic version

.claude/skills/review-pr/SKILL.md.note: Project-flavored review-pr workflow; harness-kit:review-pr available via plugin

.claude/skills/review/SKILL.md.note: Migrated from .claude/commands/review.md; delegates to code-reviewer agent

.claude/skills/verify/SKILL.md.note: Migrated from .claude/commands/verify.md; heavier sibling of verifier agent
